temporal_description: A static, medium shot captures two men from behind as they stand before a large, ornate display case. The case is set into a dark, textured wall and is framed with gold-colored molding. Inside the case, a brightly lit, colorful painting of a deity with multiple arms and a fierce expression is the central focus. The man on the left has white hair and wears a dark jacket, while the man on the right has dark hair and is also dressed in dark clothing. The audio begins with a low, resonant, and slightly ominous musical note that creates a sense of suspense and anticipation. The camera cuts to a close-up of a man with white hair, now facing the camera. He is wearing a black shirt and has a slight, knowing smile on his face. The background is softly out of focus, showing what appears to be a grand, arched ceiling with blurred lights and a golden, crystalline structure to the right. The white text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner of the frame. This is abruptly interrupted by a series of rapid, high-pitched electronic beeps, similar to a dial-up modem connecting or a digital notification sound. The shot remains a close-up on the man with white hair. His expression is now more intense and focused as he looks slightly off-camera. The background and on-screen text remain the same.
